word: H8321 - שֹׂרֵק - sôrêq - so-rake' - Choice wine

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׂרקה שׂורק שׂרק

Transliteration: śôrêq śôrêq śôrêqâh

Phonetic: so-rake'

BDB Definition:

  1. choice species of vine, choice grapes

Origin: from H8319 in the sense of redness (compare H8320)

TWOT entry: 2294c

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
